name: Keiki and the Plow
tagline: U-pick veggies, mud kitchens, goats, and a pirate ship — a rare working farm open to families.
parking: Small lot at 587 Pakala St, Hawaii Kai
bestTime: Arrive right at 9am — it fills up fast and the 2-hour window goes quickly
talkStory: Only open Saturdays 9-11am so plan accordingly. Kids can pick vegetables, play in the mud kitchen, feed goats, and climb the pirate ship structure. Wear clothes you don't mind getting dirty — mud is part of the fun. Bring a change of clothes and towel for the car. A truly unique Oahu experience most tourists never find.
